name: John Bishop
bio: John Bishop is an English comedian, presenter and actor from Liverpool known for warm, storytelling stand-up drawn from family and everyday life. A former medical sales representative, he turned professional in his thirties and broke through after a 2009 Edinburgh run, going on to host his own TV shows and stage arena tours. He later played companion Dan Lewis in Doctor Who.

timeline.ev: Makes his first appearance as a stand-up comedian
Edinburgh Fringe run brings national attention
John Bishops Britain begins on BBC One
Wins Best Male Comedy Breakthrough Artist at the British Comedy Awards
Raises millions for Sport Relief with a multi-leg charity challenge
Joins Doctor Who as companion Dan Lewis

accolades: British Comedy Award for Best Male Comedy Breakthrough Artist (2010)
Raised over four million pounds for Sport Relief in 2012
Record-setting arena tours including the Sunshine and Supersonic tours
